nasb.text: according to the custom of the priestly office, he was chosen by lot to enter the temple of the Lord and burn incense.

esv.text: according to the custom of the priesthood, he was chosen by lot to enter the temple of the Lord and burn incense.

cnv.text: 照祭司的慣例抽中了籤，進入主的聖殿燒香。

ccb.text: 他们按照祭司的规矩抽签，抽中撒迦利亚到主的殿里去烧香。

csbs.text: 照着祭司职务的规矩，抽中了签就进入主的圣所烧香。
